OPPOSITION TO BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICINGS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100017648) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, ALBERT H.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-12-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. FIRST, PLAINTIFF IS NOT REQUIRED TO ALLEGE TENDER. SECOND, A LOAN SERVICER GENERALLY OWES A DUTY TO EXERCISE REASONABLE CARE IN THE REVIEW OF A LOAN MODIFICATION APPLICATION, WHICH PLAINTIFF ADEQUALTELY ALLEGES DID NOT OCCUR. (SEE ALVAREZ V. BAC HOMES LOANS SERVICING, L.P. (2014) 228 CAL.APP.4TH 941.) DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO FILE ITS ANSWER WITHIN 10 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Vacated

Motion To Compel Plaintiff, Albert H. Wong, To Serve Further Verified Response Without Objection To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff, Albert H. Wong, And His Attorney Of Record, Real Estate Law Center, Pc, Jointly And Severally, In The Amount Of $2,310.00
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Set For Trial On Jan-03-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Aren Danielyan, Esq. (213-201-6313) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Albert Wong through Court Call.
Lior Katz, Esq. (310-733-4488) for Defendant/Moving party BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, LLC through Court Call.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court concluded Complaint is sufficient. Plaintiff submits to the tentative ruling. Defendant ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. First, Plaintiff is not required to allege tender. Second, a loan servicer generally owes a duty to exercise reasonable care in the review of a loan modification application, which Plaintiff adequaltely alleges did not occur. (See Alvarez v. BAC Homes Loans Servicing, L.P. (2014) 228 Cal.App.4th 941.) Defendant is ordered to file its Answer within 10 days of the date of the notice of entry of order. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-25-2016 Continued To May-12-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES the Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to May 12, 2016. Moving party is ordered to comply with SLFR 2.7B an dprovide courtesy copy of the moving papers and the operative complaint to department 501 no later than May 2, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than May 2, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
